description: Model-specific repair rules for Kimi / Moonshot models (Kimi K2.6, Kimi K2.5, Kimi-1.5). Per the Command Code talk, Kimi K2.6 makes far fewer tool-call mistakes than DeepSeek — it's the author's favorite open model. These rules are lightweight fallbacks for edge cases.

repairs._comment: Kimi K2.6 occasionally sends 'instruction' when tools expect 'prompt'
Kimi sometimes uses 'query_string' when tools expect 'query'
Kimi string-number repair for numeric params (rare but present at scale)
